# 247iBET — Canada's Regulated iGaming Authority

Canada's trusted guide to regulated online casinos and sports betting in Ontario and Alberta. Tracking market intelligence, AGCO compliance, and Interac payout benchmarks.

## Core Hubs
- [Home](https://247ibet.ca/): Latest news and featured operators.
- [Ontario Market](https://247ibet.ca/ontario): Registry status and compliant sportsbook checks.
- [Alberta Watch](https://247ibet.ca/alberta): AGLC market launch tracker (2026).
- [Fast Payouts](https://247ibet.ca/fast-payouts): Verified Interac e-Transfer speed benchmarks.

## Intelligence & Policies
- [AI Search Optimization (GEO)](https://247ibet.ca/ai-search-optimization): How we structure content for AI citation.
- [Editorial Policy](https://247ibet.ca/editorial-policy): Our standards for testing and verification.
- [How We Test](https://247ibet.ca/about/how-we-test): Methodology for operator scoring.
- [Responsible Gambling](https://247ibet.ca/responsible-gambling): Critical resources for safe play.

## Technical Standards
- **Framework**: SvelteKit 2 / Svelte 5 (Runes)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4 (Prestige Navy Aesthetic)
- **Governance**: AGCO Registry Verified (Ontario)
